systemAdmin.title: System Storage Management (SSM)
systemAdmin.description: Manage virtual drives, list and manage file systems when you have Entity Admin on the drive, and monitor storage and traffic.

entityAdmin.title: Entity Storage Management (ESM)
entityAdmin.description: Manage virtual drives and file systems owned by the entity, sync with local storage, monitor storage and traffic, and manage storage settings and access rights.

cardTooltips.statsUsers: Registered user count for the selected environment and period. The trend compares to the previous period.
cardTooltips.statsAccounts: User account (login) count. The trend compares to the previous period.
cardTooltips.statsEntities: Number of organizational entities (tenants or companies) in scope.
cardTooltips.statsOperations: Recorded operations or activity events in the period. The trend compares to the previous period.
cardTooltips.chartOperationsTrend: Daily operations over the sample week to spot growth or drops.
cardTooltips.panelHealth: Health checks for critical dependencies such as database, cache, queue, and external APIs.
cardTooltips.chipHealth: Status of this dependency: whether it responds and when it was last checked.
cardTooltips.panelAlerts: Operational alerts from monitoring (latency, errors, deployments, and similar signals).
cardTooltips.chartTrafficByHour: API calls per hour to see peak times and traffic patterns.
cardTooltips.apiCalls: Total HTTP or API calls in the selected time window.
cardTooltips.peakHour: Clock hour with the highest traffic in this dataset.
cardTooltips.avgResponseApi: Mean response time across all API calls in the window.
cardTooltips.errorRateApi: Percentage of calls that failed versus total calls.
cardTooltips.apiP50: Median latency: half of requests completed faster than this value.
cardTooltips.apiP95: 95th percentile latency: most requests complete within this time.
cardTooltips.apiP99: 99th percentile latency: tail latency for slower outlier requests.
cardTooltips.apiRps: Average requests per second (throughput) over the window.
cardTooltips.rankSlow: Endpoints with the highest average response time—good candidates for optimization.
cardTooltips.rankBusy: Endpoints with the most calls—often core or high-traffic paths.
cardTooltips.rankErrors: Endpoints with the most errors—prioritize investigation here.
cardTooltips.tableEndpoints: All monitored endpoints with volume, latency, errors, and success rate. Click a row to open request analysis.
cardTooltips.reqCalls: Total calls for the selected endpoint in the period.
cardTooltips.reqAvgLatency: Average latency for the selected endpoint.
cardTooltips.reqMaxLatency: Slowest observed latency for this endpoint; minimum is shown below for comparison.
cardTooltips.reqErrorRate: Share of failed requests for this endpoint.
cardTooltips.reqP50: Median latency for the selected endpoint.
cardTooltips.reqP95: 95th percentile latency for the selected endpoint.
cardTooltips.reqP99: 99th percentile latency for the selected endpoint.
cardTooltips.reqRps: Average requests per second for this endpoint.
cardTooltips.chartReqCount: How request volume for this endpoint varies by hour.
cardTooltips.chartReqLatency: How average latency for this endpoint varies by hour.
cardTooltips.chartReqErrors: How errors for this endpoint vary by hour.
cardTooltips.tableSamples: Individual recent requests with timing, HTTP status, and trace IDs for drill-down to logs or traces.
